Ryan Niblett 75 Yd Punt Return (Mason Shipley Kick)

videos.headline: Ryan Niblett takes punt return 75 yards to the house
videos.description: Oklahoma punts and Ryan Niblett breaks through the defense to score a 75-yard touchdown for Texas.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ryan Niblett takes punt return 75 yards to the house) 2025/10/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: Oklahoma Sooners vs. Texas Longhorns: Full Highlights
videos.description: Oklahoma Sooners vs. Texas Longhorns: Full Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oklahoma Sooners vs. Texas Longhorns: Full Highlights) 2025/10/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: Highlight: Texas defense smothers No. 6 Oklahoma in Red River Rivalry
videos.description: After trailing 6-3 at halftime, the Longhorns overwhelm the Sooners in the second half, holding them to 88 total yards (only five rushing) in a dominant 23-6 victory.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tate Sandell kicks 42-yard field goal) 2025/10/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: OU's John Mateer gets picked off by Malik Muhammad
videos.description: John Mateer throws an interception to Malik Muhammad and Texas takes over.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (OU's John Mateer gets picked off by Malik Muhammad) 2025/10/11 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Tate Sandell kicks 41-yard field goal) 2025/10/11 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Mason Shipley kicks 22-yard field goal) 2025/10/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: Arch Manning finds DeAndre Moore Jr. for a TD
videos.description: Arch Manning connects with DeAndre Moore Jr. in the end zone for a Texas touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Arch Manning finds DeAndre Moore Jr. for a TD) 2025/10/11 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Mason Shipley makes 48-yard field goal) 2025/10/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: Mateer picked off again by Texas
videos.description: John Mateer throws his second interception of the game, this time to Graceson Littleton.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Mateer picked off again by Texas) 2025/10/11 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Mason Shipley makes 39-yard field goal) 2025/10/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: Steve Sarkisian says beating Oklahoma is a proud moment for Texas
videos.description: Sarkisian shines the spotlight on the Longhorns' defensive performance and commends Arch Manning for leading them to a victory over the Sooners in the Red River Rivalry.

videos.headline: Explaining Arch Manning's success, OU's faults in Red River Rivalry
videos.description: The SEC Now crew recaps the Red River Rivalry matchup as they discuss Arch Manning's improvements and where the Sooners fell short against the Longhorns.
